body: PT Adaro Energy Indonesia plans to divest 7 billion shares of its subsidiary, PT Adaro Andalan Indonesia, to its shareholders, with a transaction value ranging from $2.44 billion to $2.62 billion, or 31.8% to 34.1% of Adaro's total equity. The divestment is expected to generate significant revenue, with AAI's revenues and profits reaching $2.65 billion and $922.76 million, respectively, accounting for 89.4% and 104.8% of Adaro's revenues and profits.
title: Adaro Energy to Divest Up to 7 Billion Shares of Subsidiary Adaro Andalan Indonesia to Raise $2.44-$2.62 Billion.

body: Foreign investors bought a net volume of 52.15 million shares in various Indonesian companies, including PT Darma Henwa Tbk, PT Kawasan Industri Jababeka Tbk, and PT Wulandari Bangun Laksana Tbk, with a total foreign buying volume of 4.41 billion shares. Meanwhile, they sold a net volume of -115.71 million shares in companies such as PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk, PT Bumi Resources Tbk, and PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia Tbk, with a total foreign selling volume of 4.36 billion shares.
title: Foreign Investors Buy 177 Million Shares of PT Darma Henwa and Other Indonesian Companies on Tuesday
